# TKTokenKeychainItem

**Class**

An abstract base class for managing a token’s contents as keychain items.

## Declaration

```swift
class TKTokenKeychainItem
```

## Overview

Don’t use this base class directly. Instead, use one of its subclasses, such as [doc://com.apple.cryptotokenkit/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKTokenKeychainCertificate] for managing certificates or [doc://com.apple.cryptotokenkit/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKTokenKeychainKey] for managing cryptographic keys.

## Creating Token Keychain Items

- **init(objectID:)**: Initializes a token keychain item with the specified object ID.

## Accessing Keychain Item Attributes

- **objectID**: Returns the object ID used for keychain item identification.
- **label**: The user-visible label for the keychain item.
- **constraints**: Access constraints for the keychain item, keyed by [doc://com.apple.cryptotokenkit/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKTokenOperation] values wrapped in [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSNumber] objects.

## Accessing Keychain Items

- **keychainContents**: The contents of the keychain for this token.
- **TKTokenKeychainContents**: A representation of the state of the keychain for a particular token.
- **TKTokenKeychainCertificate**: A token’s certificate as stored in the keychain.
- **TKTokenKeychainKey**: A token’s key as stored in the keychain.
- **TKToken.ObjectID**: A unique and persistent identifier of a particular token object.
- **TKToken.ObjectID**: A unique and persistent identifier of a particular token object.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Inherited By

- TKTokenKeychainCertificate
- TKTokenKeychainKey

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
